name: Ascenda WF-01b: A&P Promo Plan Template Population

parameters.subject: =A&P Promo Plan Created: {{ $('Promo Plan Setup Trigger').first().json.brandName }}
parameters.message:
=

A&P Promo Plan Template Populated

The A&P Marketing Budget Tracker has been populated for {{ $('Promo Plan Setup Trigger').first().json.brandName }} with category-specific line items.

Sections:

  • Advertising (55% allocation) — brand awareness activities
  • Promotional (17% allocation) — conversion/performance media
  • Non-Working (28% allocation) — tools, platforms, compliance

Default monthly amounts are pre-filled based on the {{ $('Promo Plan Setup Trigger').first().json.category }} category. Adjust as needed during planning sessions with the brand.

meta.description: Populates the per-brand A&P Promo Plan spreadsheet with category-aware template data. Triggered by WF-01 after brand spreadsheet is created. Three budget sections: Advertising (55%), Promotional (17%), Non-Working (28%) with line items customized by product category.
